title: Losstupidoz Expanded
description: A medium-weight modpack that enhances Minecraft with QOL upgrades, performance boosts, and expanded gameplay and world generation. Discover new mechanics and richer exploration for a fresh yet familiar experience.
body:
## **Losstupidos Expanded**

What you wake up as is up to you, your aim? survival, how? that's completely up to you. When you look around you see endless terrain. Exploring is tempting, but be carefull! You will both friends and foes, villages and pillages, fortresses and ruins, make sure you're equipped with the right tools for the job!


## **What this modpack does**

This modpack enhances Minecraft with a mix of quality-of-life improvements, performance optimizations, and expanded gameplay and world generation. It builds upon the foundation of vanilla Minecraft with smoother mechanics, improved exploration, and a richer variety of biomes and structures. 

Whether you prefer adventuring, building, or automation, the pack aims to make every aspect of gameplay more engaging and rewarding—all while maintaining the charm and balance that make Minecraft feel like home.

---


## **Features:**

- Terrain generation
- QOL improvements
- Better nether and end
- Performance enhancements
- visual improvements
- origins
- medieval origins expanded
- Chunk loading
- Proximity chat (make sure the ports are open while running on a server)

## **Warning**

While it is true that this modpack features performance enhancement, it is important to check wether you meet the minimum RAM allocation requirements due to the amount of mods included in this pack.

- MIN RAM: 8GB

### **Load chunks via chunky:** run in game or server CLI
```bash

# Help from chunky
/chunky help <PAGE>

# increase load radius: the recommended method is to increase incrementally
/chunky radius <RADIUS>

# decides the shape of the bounds of radius
/chunky shape <SHAPE>

# starts chunky
/chunky start

# pauses chunky
/chunky pause

```

## **Known bugs**
None at the moment
